message:
fix(bracket): Implement cancel-safe bracket with Drop for release on cancellation

The bracket combinator now implements proper cancel safety:
- Added Bracket struct with explicit state machine phases
- Implements Drop to call release when dropped during Using phase
- Uses Pin<Box<>> for futures to avoid Unpin bounds
- Synchronously drives release future to completion in Drop

[asupersync-akom]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
